species: In this study, C. elaphus kansuensis were fed on a semi-wild Shandan horse farm.
tissue: cartilage parts in the antler tip were separated for transcriptome and proteome analyses...
disease_state: The velvet antler is a unique model for cancer and regeneration research...
sample_source: velvet antlers at different growth stages (30 d, 60 d, and 90 d) were collected from three adult male deer at each time point.
age: velvet antlers at different growth stages (30 d, 60 d, and 90 d)...
sex: three adult male deer at each time point.
